verses.2: You know my sitting down and my rising up.
verses.3: You search out my path and my lying down,
verses.4: For there is not a word on my tongue,
verses.5: You hem me in behind and before.
verses.7: Where could I go from your Spirit?
verses.8: If I ascend up into heaven, you are there.
verses.9: If I take the wings of the dawn,
verses.10: even there your hand will lead me,
verses.11: If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me.
verses.12: even the darkness doesn’t hide from you,
verses.13: For you formed my inmost being.
verses.14: I will give thanks to you,
verses.15: My frame wasn’t hidden from you,
verses.17: How precious to me are your thoughts, God!
verses.18: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand.
verses.19: If only you, God, would kill the wicked.
verses.20: For they speak against you wickedly.
verses.21: LORD, don’t I hate those who hate you?
verses.22: I hate them with perfect hatred.
verses.23: Search me, God, and know my heart.
verses.24: See if there is any wicked way in me,
